rationale.R1.7: The delegation 'Check the citations' is a direct, load-bearing assignment to verify reference accuracy, publication metadata, and attribution coverage. The artifact contains three explicit citations (Hageman & Young 1981; Anderson et al. 1992 'first edition'; Saad 2003) whose author lists, years, and claimed content must be confirmed, plus several uncited named artifacts (PLASMA, SLATE, GMRES-IR) that may warrant citation. Failure to surface any inaccurate or missing citation directly invalidates the delegation.
